/b7c63f7d3a4141779630e2ca39a3c1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776790225\u0026x-signature=VKjRy3hqhqWGSIbUxk6yxWlgCwk%3D","user_id":"505408940946312","user_name":"小书童和皮皮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"505408940946312","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6794034353472015371","book_info":{"abstract":"诡异的古玩店，店主鬼眼鉴宝，千金买鬼骨！以为店主只会鉴宝吗？错，还会鉴别美女！霸道女总裁，当红大明星，偏门奇女子，清纯校花，邻家小妹……一眼看穿你的心！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/aae6240fbdb8ec292c1ebed7d5e31e14","author":"曳尾斋主","author_id":"","book_id":"6794034353472015371","book_name":"茅山门徒","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d8c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":751,\"name\":\"悬疑灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751\u0026name=悬疑灵异\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":90,\"name\":\"天才\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90\u0026name=天才\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":100,\"name\":\"灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100\u0026name=灵异\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1455,\"name\":\"风水秘术\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1455\u0026name=风水秘术\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6794034762232103436","read_count":"28274","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1550569"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"754","tags":"悬疑灵异,灵异,天才,风水秘术","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/aec51b93e4be7639728143ca9c641558~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779396130\u0026x-signature=3eyWiA1cyCeEf8Gix6UPs8uaHGk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"96281752799","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032304421056D6A483591711362EF7\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":178,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10793,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10793,"reply_count":18,"show_pv":433391},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1585954540,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7403339587191554878","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这才叫小说！这本小说在人物心理刻画方面表现出色，读来轻松自在，令人身心舒畅、愉悦至极。其具备丰富的想象力与创造力，情节奇幻多姿。而且，小说所蕴含的价值观契合中华人民向善的道德观念，其构建的世界观遵循中华民族传统文化的设定，逻辑严丝合缝、通顺流畅。尤为值得一提的是，小说中人物的对话诙谐有趣，能给人带来欢乐，有效减轻压力。第一次给一本小说五星好评。本书将小说该有的优点都表现了出来。","text_exts":[{"e":37,"s":35,"text":"舒畅","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E8%88%92%E7%95%85\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177421213011362EF7%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227403339587191554878%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226794034353472015371%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%88%92%E7%95%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723727292,"group_id":"6794034353472015371","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更00000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1CDK3iJfeYwdz5LYVLG3zPqXegkzDzrybSdcsqye7YB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.c
